content_en:
682 Book of The End: Great Trials and Tribulations

“(Delicate and pure) as if they were (hidden) eggs (well) preserved’) He 2% said, ‘Their delicateness is like the delicateness of the skin on the inside of an egg (i.c. the fine thin layer that comes after the shell)...’ I said, ‘O Messenger of Allah, inform me about His saying:

Book of The End: Great Trials and Tribulations 683

matties two, three, or four husbands (in the world, after divorce or after the death of a husband), and then she dies. Then she enters Paradise and they enter with her. Who will be her husband?’ He #8 said, ‘O Umm Salamah, she is given a choice, and she chooses the one from them who had the best manners. So she will say: O my Lord, this one had better manners towards me in the abode of the world than the rest of them, so marry me to him. O Umm Salamah, good manners have taken the goodness of the world and the Hereafter.” (Related by At-Tabaraanee)

The following, which explains how the believers enter Paradise, has already been mentioned in the hadith of the horn: “A man from them will enter upon 72 wives — from that which Allah created — and two (wives) from the children of Adam. And the latter are superior over whomsoever Allah #é pleases, due to their worship of Allah % in the world. He (ie., the dweller of Paradise) will enter upon the first of the two in a room made of rubies. She will be ona bed of gold, and it will be enwreathed with pearls. In it are 70 drawers of fine and thick silk. He will place his hand between her shoulders, and then he will look at his hand from her chest, from behind her garments, her flesh, and her skin, And he will look at the bone marrow of her leg, just as one of you looks at a wire of silver in ruby. While he is like that, it will be called out, ‘We know that you do not become bored and that she does not become bored, but, Lo! You have wives other than her. Then he will go out, and go to them, one at a time. Every time he goes to one, she says, ‘By Allah, there is none in Paradise who is better than you, and there is none in Paradise who is more beloved to me than you.” Through many chains —- some of which have been mentioned and some are still to come, Insha Allah, and we place our trast in Him — this hadith has many others that attest to it. And we have previously mentioned the following hadith, which is related by Ahmad, and which Abu

684 Book of The End: Great Trials and Tribulations

Hurairah 4 related from the Prophet #%: “And he has 72 wives from the Al-Hoor (beautiful women) Al-’Een (having wide, beautiful eyes), other than his wives from the world. And verily, one of them takes her seat, which is as big as a mile on earth.”

Abu Sa’eed # reported that the Messenger of Allah #¢ said, “The least of the dwellers of Paradise in ranking has 80 000 servants and 72 wives. A dome of pearls, emeralds, and rubies is erected for him; (it is as big) as the distance between Al-Jaabiyah and As-San‘aa.” (Related by Harmalah) Ahmad and At-Tirmidhee related it as well, and each with his respective chain. .

Al-Miqdaam ibn Ma’dee Karib related that the Messenger of Allah #8 said, “Verily, the martyr has six characteristics that are specific to him with Allah: 1) Allah forgives him at the first drop of his blood; 2) he sees his seating place in Paradise; 3) He is adored with the garment of Eemnan; 4) he is protected from the punishment of the grave; 5) he is safe from the greater terror; 6) and the Crown of Dignity is placed on his head. One ruby from it is better than the world and all that is in it, And he will marry 72 wives from the AlHoor Al-'Een (fair maidens of Paradise, who have wide, beautiful eyes). And he will intercede for 70 people from his relatives,” Ahmad, At-Tirmidee, and Ibn Maajah related this hadith, and AtTirmidhee ruled it to be authentic.

But what about the hadith that Muslim related in his sahih, in which Ayyoob ibn Muhammad said, “Either vie with one another or reflect among yourselves; are there more men in Paradise or more women?” Abu Hurairah 4 said, “Did not Abul-Qaasim 2% say, “Verily, the first group to enter Paradise are upon the appearance of

Book of The End: Great Trials and Tribulations 685

the moon on the night of the full moon. Those who follow that group are upon (the appearance of) the most illuminated glistening, star in the sky. Bach man among them has two wives; the bone marrow of their legs can be seen from behind their flesh. And there is no unmarried person in Paradise.” And through another chain, the same hadith is related in Bukhaaree and Muslim.

‘The two wives mentioned here refer to the daughters of Adam (Le. a dweller of Paradise will have two wives from the daughters of Adam), and along with them one will have as much Al-Hoor Al-‘Een (fair maidens of Paradise, who have wide, beautiful eyes) as Allah ‘Azza Wo-Jall (To Him belongs Might and Majesty) pleases one to have. The details of that have previously been discussed, and Allah #¢ knows best.

Abu Hurairah # reported that the Prophet # said, “A man in Paradise has two wives from the Al-Hoor Al-‘Een (beautiful, fair women of Paradise that have wide, beautiful eyes); upon each one of them are 70 robes, and the bone marrow of their legs can be seen from behind their garments.” .

These Alaadeeth are not in conflict with what is established in another hadith that is related by Bukhaaree and Muslim: “I looked into the Hellfire, and I saw that most of its dwellers were women.” This is because women might constitute the majority of dwellers in Hell as well as the majority of dwellers in Paradise. Or, perhaps, they constitute the majority of dwellers in Hell and then some of them come out through intercession, and end up in Paradise, thus increasing the population of women in Paradise. And Allah % knows best.

The following is the hadith of Darraaj, which Abu Sa’eed a ascribed to the Prophet #%: “Verily, a man from Paradise will recline for 70 years before moving, Then a woman will come to him and strike him on his shoulders. He will look with his face at her cheek, which is purer than a mirror. The smallest pearl upon her illuminates what is between the east and the west. She will give him greetings of peace, and he will respond with greetings of peach. ‘And he will ask her, ‘Who are you?’ Then she will say, ‘I am from the Al-Mazeed (the increase).’ She will have on her 70 garments... His gaze will pierce through them until he sees the blood marrow of her legs from behind that.” Ahmad related it in Al-Musnad.

Anas 4 reported that the Messenger of Allah said, “An excursion

686 Book of The End: Great Trials and Tribulations

during the beginning of the day in the way of Allah or an excursion at the end of the day (in the way of Allah) is better than the world and all that is in it. And the arm-span of one of you or the place of his Qid — meaning his whip — in Paradise is better than the world and all that is in it. And were a woman from the women of the dwellers of Paradise to appear to the world, she would fill what is between its two sides with fragrance, and what is between its two sides would become pure. And the veil on her head is better than the world and all that is in it.” (Ahmad) Bukhaaree related this through a different chain, and we mentioned it in its entirety at the beginning of our discussion on the description of Paradise.
content_id: 682 Kitab Akhir Zaman: Fitnah dan Cobaan Besar

Beliau bersabda, 'Kelembutannya seperti kelembutan kulit di bagian dalam telur (yaitu lapisan tipis halus yang ada setelah cangkangnya)...' Aku berkata, 'Wahai Rasulullah, beritahukan kepadaku tentang firman-Nya:

Kitab Akhir Zaman: Fitnah dan Cobaan Besar 683

memiliki dua, tiga, atau empat suami (di dunia, setelah perceraian atau setelah kematian suami), lalu ia meninggal. Kemudian ia masuk surga dan mereka masuk bersamanya. Siapa yang akan menjadi suaminya?' Beliau #8 bersabda, 'Wahai Ummu Salamah, ia diberi pilihan, dan ia memilih yang terbaik akhlaknya di antara mereka. Maka ia akan berkata: Ya Tuhanku, yang ini memiliki akhlak terbaik terhadapku di negeri dunia dibanding yang lainnya, maka nikahkanlah aku dengannya. Wahai Ummu Salamah, akhlak yang baik mengambil kebaikan dunia dan akhirat.'

Seorang laki-laki dari mereka akan masuk menemui 72 istri — dari apa yang Allah ciptakan — dan dua (istri) dari anak-anak cucu Adam. Dan yang terakhir ini lebih utama dari siapa pun yang Allah kehendaki, karena ibadah mereka kepada Allah % di dunia. Ia (yaitu penghuni surga) akan masuk menemui yang pertama dari keduanya di sebuah kamar yang terbuat dari permata merah. Ia berada di atas ranjang emas, dan ranjang itu dihiasi mutiara. Di dalamnya ada 70 laci kain sutera halus dan tebal. Ia akan meletakkan tangannya di antara bahu perempuan itu, kemudian ia akan melihat tangannya dari dadanya, menembus pakaiannya, dagingnya, dan kulitnya. Dan ia akan melihat sumsum tulang betisnya, sebagaimana salah seorang dari kalian melihat kawat perak di dalam permata merah. Sementara ia dalam keadaan demikian, akan dipanggil, 'Kami tahu kamu tidak bosan dan dia tidak bosan, namun ketahuilah! Kamu memiliki istri-istri lain selain dia.' Kemudian ia akan pergi, dan mendatangi mereka satu per satu. Setiap kali ia mendatangi salah seorang, perempuan itu berkata, 'Demi Allah, tidak ada di surga yang lebih baik daripadamu, dan tidak ada di surga yang lebih aku cintai daripadamu.'

Dan ia memiliki 72 istri dari Al-Huur (wanita cantik) Al-'Een (yang bermata lebar dan indah), selain istri-istrinya dari dunia. Dan sesungguhnya salah seorang dari mereka mengambil tempat duduknya, yang sebesar satu mil di bumi.

Penghuni surga yang paling rendah kedudukannya memiliki 80.000 pelayan dan 72 istri. Sebuah kubah dari mutiara, zamrud, dan permata merah didirikan untuknya; (besarnya) seperti jarak antara Al-Jaabiyah dan As-Shon'aa.

Sesungguhnya seorang syahid memiliki enam keistimewaan khusus darinya di sisi Allah: 1) Allah mengampuninya pada tetesan darahnya yang pertama; 2) ia melihat tempatnya di surga; 3) ia dihiasi dengan pakaian iman; 4) ia dilindungi dari azab kubur; 5) ia aman dari ketakutan yang besar; 6) dan Mahkota Kemuliaan diletakkan di atas kepalanya. Satu permata merah darinya lebih baik dari dunia dan segala isinya. Dan ia akan menikahi 72 istri dari Al-Huur Al-'Een (bidadari surga yang bermata lebar dan indah). Dan ia akan memberi syafaat untuk 70 orang dari kerabatnya.
Berlombalah atau renungkanlah di antara kalian; apakah lebih banyak laki-laki di surga atau lebih banyak perempuan?

Bukankah Abul-Qasim telah bersabda, 'Sesungguhnya kelompok pertama yang masuk surga adalah dalam rupa

Kitab Akhir Zaman: Fitnah dan Cobaan Besar 685

bulan pada malam purnama. Mereka yang mengikuti kelompok itu adalah dalam rupa bintang paling terang yang bersinar di langit. Setiap laki-laki di antara mereka memiliki dua istri; sumsum tulang betis mereka dapat terlihat dari balik daging mereka. Dan tidak ada yang tidak menikah di surga.'

Seorang laki-laki di surga memiliki dua istri dari Al-Huur Al-'Een (wanita cantik surga yang bermata lebar dan indah); pada masing-masing mereka ada 70 pakaian, dan sumsum tulang betis mereka dapat terlihat dari balik pakaian mereka.
Aku mengintip ke Neraka Jahanam, dan aku melihat bahwa sebagian besar penghuninya adalah perempuan.

Sesungguhnya seorang laki-laki dari surga akan bersandar selama 70 tahun sebelum bergerak. Kemudian seorang perempuan akan datang kepadanya dan menepuk bahunya. Ia akan melihat dengan wajahnya ke pipinya, yang lebih murni dari cermin. Mutiara terkecil di atasnya menerangi jarak antara timur dan barat. Ia akan memberinya salam, dan ia akan membalas salamnya. Dan ia akan bertanya kepadanya, 'Siapa kamu?' Kemudian ia akan berkata, 'Aku dari Al-Maziid (tambahan).' Ia memakai 70 helai pakaian... Pandangannya akan menembus pakaian-pakaian itu hingga ia melihat sumsum tulang betisnya dari balik itu semua.

Perjalanan di awal hari di jalan Allah atau perjalanan di penghujung hari (di jalan Allah)

686 Kitab Akhir Zaman: Fitnah dan Cobaan Besar

lebih baik dari dunia dan segala isinya. Dan rentangan tangan salah seorang dari kalian atau tempat cambuknya di surga lebih baik dari dunia dan segala isinya. Dan seandainya seorang perempuan dari perempuan-perempuan penghuni surga muncul ke dunia, ia akan memenuhi kedua sisinya dengan wewangian, dan kedua sisinya pun akan menjadi suci. Dan kerudung di atas kepalanya lebih baik dari dunia dan segala isinya.
